companies.name: BrightWave Technologies
companies.description: BrightWave Technologies is a growth-stage SaaS company focused on building secure, cloud-native platforms for enterprise customers. The company emphasizes remote-friendly work, modern engineering practices, and cross-functional collaboration across product, design, and data teams.

companies.name: UrbanGrid Solutions
companies.description: UrbanGrid Solutions is a New York–based digital marketing and analytics agency partnering with global brands to optimize their online customer acquisition. Teams span marketing, design, and engineering disciplines with a strong focus on data-driven experimentation.

companies.name: Northwind Retail Group
companies.description: Northwind Retail Group operates a portfolio of e-commerce and brick-and-mortar brands across North America. The company is investing heavily in marketing, logistics technology, and customer experience to modernize its retail operations.

companies.name: Helio Health Services
companies.description: Helio Health Services builds digital tools that connect patients, providers, and payers in a unified experience. With teams in product, data science, and customer operations, Helio focuses on evidence-based design and regulatory-compliant innovation.

companies.name: CloudLink Support Co.
companies.description: CloudLink Support Co. provides outsourced customer support and success services for fast-growing SaaS and e-commerce companies. The organization offers 24/7 omnichannel support roles with structured training, clear progression paths, and hybrid work options.

saved_job_lists.name: General Saved
saved_job_lists.description: Default list for jobs you save while browsing.

saved_job_lists.name: High Priority Roles
saved_job_lists.description: Roles to review and apply to within the next week.

saved_job_lists.name: Support Targets
saved_job_lists.description: Customer Support positions in the target salary range at highly-rated companies.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: BrightWave Technologies is seeking a remote Software Engineer to help build highly scalable SaaS features for enterprise customers. You will work with product managers and designers to implement new APIs, web interfaces, and data integrations. Responsibilities include writing clean, testable code, participating in code reviews, and collaborating with cross-functional teams to ship features on a two-week release cadence.

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: UrbanGrid Solutions is hiring a hybrid Software Engineer to support our marketing analytics platform. In this role, you will implement data pipelines, build internal tools, and optimize API performance for large-scale advertising campaigns. You will collaborate closely with data science, marketing, and design teams to deliver high-quality features and maintain engineering best practices.

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer
jobs.description: Helio Health Services is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to lead development of our patient engagement platform. You will design and implement secure microservices, mentor junior engineers, and drive architecture decisions. The role involves close collaboration with product, design, and clinical stakeholders to deliver features that improve patient outcomes.

jobs.title: Software Engineer (Backend)
jobs.description: CloudLink Support Co. is expanding its platform engineering team with a Backend Software Engineer. You will build robust APIs, integrate third-party systems, and improve reliability for our customer support tooling. The position offers a hybrid schedule with 2–3 days in our New York office.

jobs.title: Product Manager
jobs.description: BrightWave Technologies is seeking a Product Manager to own the roadmap for our core analytics product. You will conduct customer discovery, define requirements, and collaborate with engineering and design to ship impactful features. Responsibilities include prioritizing the backlog, creating clear specifications, and measuring product success using quantitative and qualitative data.

jobs.title: Senior Product Manager
jobs.description: Helio Health Services is hiring a Senior Product Manager to lead a cross-functional squad focused on care coordination workflows. You will own strategy and execution, drive discovery with clinicians and patients, and translate insights into a clear roadmap. The role includes partnering with engineering leadership to balance technical investments with new feature delivery.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager
jobs.description: Northwind Retail Group is looking for a Marketing Manager to drive multi-channel campaigns for our consumer brands. You will manage a small team, coordinate with merchandising and e-commerce, and optimize spend across paid search, social, and email. The role requires strong analytical skills and the ability to translate data into actionable campaign improvements.

jobs.title: Marketing Manager - B2C Growth
jobs.description: UrbanGrid Solutions is hiring a Marketing Manager focused on B2C growth initiatives for key client accounts. You will design and execute acquisition campaigns, run A/B tests across creative and landing pages, and collaborate with data analysts to improve conversion rates. This hybrid role offers the opportunity to own end-to-end performance for key markets.

jobs.title: Senior UX Designer
jobs.description: UrbanGrid Solutions is seeking a Senior UX Designer to lead end-to-end experience design for our marketing analytics platform. You will plan and conduct user research, translate insights into wireframes and prototypes, and collaborate closely with product managers and engineers to ship intuitive interfaces. The role includes owning the design system, facilitating design critiques, and championing user testing across the organization.

jobs.title: Customer Support Specialist
jobs.description: CloudLink Support Co. is hiring a Customer Support Specialist to provide email and chat support for SaaS clients. You will troubleshoot product issues, document common questions, and work with our product team to surface customer feedback. This role includes a structured onboarding program, clear performance metrics, and opportunities for progression into senior support or customer success roles.

jobs.title: Customer Support Representative
jobs.description: Helio Health Services is looking for a Customer Support Representative to assist clinics and patients using our digital health tools. You will handle inbound calls and tickets, educate users on product features, and escalate complex issues appropriately. The role requires strong empathy, clear communication, and comfort learning healthcare terminology.

jobs.title: Customer Support Associate
jobs.description: BrightWave Technologies is hiring an onsite Customer Support Associate to support enterprise customers. You will respond to support tickets, help troubleshoot integration issues, and collaborate with engineering to resolve bugs. This role is ideal for early-career professionals interested in growing into technical support or customer success.

jobs.title: Junior QA Engineer
jobs.description: BrightWave Technologies is seeking a Junior QA Engineer to support manual and automated testing of our web applications. You will execute test plans, log defects, and work closely with developers to ensure high-quality releases. This role provides mentorship and exposure to modern CI/CD pipelines and test automation frameworks.

jobs.title: Data Analyst
jobs.description: Helio Health Services is hiring a Data Analyst to support analytics for clinical operations and product decision-making. You will build dashboards, perform exploratory analyses, and present insights to stakeholders across the company. The role involves working with large healthcare datasets and requires strong SQL skills and attention to data quality.

jobs.title: Data Scientist
jobs.description: Helio Health Services is looking for a Data Scientist to develop models that improve patient engagement and care outcomes. You will design experiments, build predictive models, and partner with product to evaluate impact. The role includes mentoring junior analysts and contributing to our shared ML tooling and best practices.

jobs.title: Office Manager
jobs.description: CloudLink Support Co. is hiring an Office Manager to oversee day-to-day operations in our Denver office. You will manage facilities, coordinate events, support HR onboarding, and ensure a smooth experience for employees and visitors. This role is well-suited for a highly organized professional who enjoys working across teams.

jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.description: BrightWave Technologies is hiring a Customer Success Manager to own relationships with a portfolio of enterprise accounts. You will onboard new customers, drive product adoption, and coordinate renewals and expansions. The role requires strong stakeholder management skills and the ability to translate customer feedback into product insights.

saved_jobs.notes: Strong fit with my SaaS product background; salary range aligns with expectations.

candidate_profiles.summary: Senior Product Manager with 7 years of experience building and launching B2B SaaS products. Comfortable leading cross-functional squads from discovery through delivery, with a focus on data-informed decision-making and clear communication with stakeholders.

Lead Data Scientist specializing in end-to-end ML solutions from problem framing to production deployment. Experienced in building predictive models and experimentation frameworks in healthcare and SaaS environments, with a track record of mentoring junior team members.

Senior Data Scientist with 5 years of experience using Python and SQL to drive growth and operational efficiency. Comfortable partnering with product and engineering to design experiments, build models, and communicate results to non-technical stakeholders.

Data Scientist focused on experimentation and product analytics. Experienced in designing A/B tests, building predictive models, and turning messy data into clear, visual stories that drive product decisions.

Data Scientist with a focus on natural language processing and text analytics. Skilled in building and evaluating NLP models and working closely with engineers to integrate them into production systems.
Product Manager with experience in B2C and marketplace products. Skilled at collaborating with design and engineering to deliver features that balance user value and technical constraints.

Senior UX Designer with 8 years of experience designing data-heavy web applications. Known for driving user research, facilitating design workshops, and delivering polished prototypes that align with business goals.

Marketing Manager experienced in leading cross-channel campaigns and managing budgets across paid search, social, and email. Comfortable analyzing performance data and presenting clear recommendations to stakeholders.

Customer Support Specialist with experience in SaaS environments, known for high CSAT scores and creating support documentation that scales. Interested in remote roles with growth into team lead positions.

Data Scientist with experience in recommendation systems and customer segmentation. Strong collaborator with engineering teams, with a focus on building reliable data pipelines and interpretable models.

job_applications.cover_letter: I am a Marketing Manager with six years of experience running performance campaigns across paid search, social, and email. I am excited about the opportunity to lead B2C growth initiatives in Chicago and believe my track record of improving ROAS and conversion rates would add immediate value to your clients.

As a Senior Product Manager with seven years of experience in B2B SaaS, I have led cross-functional squads from discovery through launch on complex, data-intensive products. I am particularly interested in your focus on care coordination and would welcome the chance to partner with clinicians and engineers to ship impactful workflows that improve patient outcomes.

I have eight years of experience designing complex analytics interfaces and leading end-to-end UX processes from user research through high-fidelity prototyping. I am excited by the opportunity to own the design system for your marketing analytics platform and to champion user testing practices that keep the team focused on real customer needs.

shortlists.name: Boston DS May
shortlists.description: Top-rated Data Scientist candidates in Boston with Python experience for May hiring pipeline.

shortlists.name: NY Product Managers
shortlists.description: Shortlist of experienced Product Managers available in New York for upcoming roles.
